case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARIO VILLALTA

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-25-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALTA, MARIO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUL-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALTA, MARIO
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT VILLALTA, MARIO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLALTA, MARIO $3,059.26 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,284.26, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 15264074) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
